---
title: "Step 7. Calculate area-adjusted Condition at project start (year 0)"
format: html
---
Note: In grouped project scenarios, the area-adjusted Condition must be independently calculated for each instance and then summed.

Multiply the total ecosystem Extent (in hectares) by the Condition at project start calculated in the previous step. Report the value, showing the calculation.

The following equation from Step 7 was used for validation of the tropical/sub-tropical dry forests ecosystem:

$$
Ca_0 = E_0 \times C_0
$$

Where:

-   $Ca_0$ = Area-adjusted condition

-   $E_0$ = Project extent at project start

-   $C_0$ = Condition at project start

The results can be found in Table 7.

<details open>

<summary><strong>[Table 7](#table7). Area-adjusted Condition at Project Start</strong></summary>

::: {#table7 .terra-standard}
| Ecosystem Type          | Extent (E₀) (ha) |   C₀ |       Ca₀ |
|:------------------------|-----------------:|-----:|----------:|
| Subtropical Dry Forests |       122,158.00 | 0.76 | 93,408.90 |
:::

</details>
